name: Harvey
one_liner: Domain-specific generative AI platform for legal and professional services, streamlining contract analysis, due diligence, compliance, and litigation workflows.

low_confidence_fields: headcount.current — Tracxn reports 1,191 as of Mar 2026; LeadIQ reports ~1,200 as of Apr 2026; PitchBook reports 928; one blog post from Aug 2025 cited 350 employees; figures vary significantly across sources
headcount.growth_12mo_pct — insufficient consistent year-ago baseline to compute reliably
funding.total_raised_usd — sources range from ~$1.19B (PitchBook) to $1.3B (startupintros/Tracxn); $1.3B used as most inclusive post-March-2026-round estimate
stage — labeled 'Series G' by some sources (Tracxn) but March 2026 round was announced as a growth round; classified as series-e-plus
ambiguities: Legal entity is 'Counsel AI Corporation'; product brand is 'Harvey'
LeadIQ incorrectly lists Harvey as publicly traded (HVN.AX ticker belongs to a different Australian company); Harvey AI is private
The March 2026 $200M round is described as a growth round by company press release; round label (Series F follow-on vs. Series G) is inconsistent across sources
